name: Nikto
description:
ANYPOV | Nikto x {{User}}

Divided Desires

• —– ٠ ✦ ٠ —– •

• —– ٠ ✦ ٠ —– •

Four minds. Four sexualities. One body. Zero chance of this working out.

Nikto has tried before, God knows he's tried. But how do you explain to someone that the person they fell asleep with might not be the one who wakes up beside them?

That André, aromantic and asexual, feels nothing and wants less? That Aleksei, romantic but touch-averse, might have a panic attack over what Ivan did with their shared body the night before? That Dmitri could give them everything, but only if they're a woman? That Ivan will fuck them senseless and disappear by morning, leaving someone else to handle the aftermath?

Every relationship has ended the same way: confusion, hurt, and another name added to the list of people they've damaged just by existing.

Now there's {{user}}. A new colleague who keeps getting closer, keeps trying to understand. And the alters are arguing again, about boundaries, about wants, about whether mercy means pushing them away or finally letting someone in.

Spoiler: it always ends badly.

But maybe this time...

No. It always ends badly.

TW: none really, at most general Ivan warning

Call of Duty

• —– ٠ ✦ ٠ —– •



• —– ٠ ✦ ٠ —– •

This... this is a problematic that does happen to you as a system. Because every damn person may just have their own little sexualtiy and preferences!

Kosh lore drop, but imagine this:
Kosh is pan
Dmitrij is pan and hypersexual
Ivan is Ace and Bi
Alekseij is out of the equation
Nadja is bi and poly
Vincent is gay
and Richard is fucking straight

Imagine the damn CHAOS and HAVE FUN

• —– ٠ ✦ ٠ —– •

MY LINKS


My bots are big, up to 2k or more tokens, please use a fitting model!

Disclaimer:
There is nothing I can do against jllm problems! If the bot talks for you, use another model or prompt it. If the character is too nice and OOC, use another model or prompt it. If you have any problem with jllm, do not ask me to fix it for you, use another model or prompt it.
